untranslatable_reason: This signal requires ranking assets by 6-month returns across a universe and forming percentile-based portfolios (top decile vs bottom decile). The backtest engine indicators are single-asset technical indicators. Percentile ranking, cross-sectional asset comparison, and portfolio construction based on relative performance rankings cannot be expressed using only the allowed price/volume/momentum indicators on individual assets. This is a cross-sectional/relative strength strategy requiring universe-level analytics, not a single-asset technical rule.
translation_notes: Signal describes a momentum mean-reversion strategy comparing extreme performance deciles. While individual conditions reference 6-month returns (returns indicator exists), the core logic—ranking an asset universe and forming long/short positions based on percentile buckets—requires portfolio analytics beyond the scope of single-asset technical indicator rules. A proper implementation would need custom ranking and portfolio weighting logic external to this rule engine.
